title: Orange Design System – UI Framework
content: Design System from Directories: Components: Orange Design System is a framework crafted to elevate digital experiences across their products and services. Rooted in user-centric design principles, it encompasses a wealth of design guidelines, components, and resources. With a focus on accessibility and inclusivity, it empowers designers and developers to build engaging experiences that reflect Orange's brand identity while catering to diverse user needs. Accessibility Color System Component overview Component status Data visualization Repository Icons Illustrations Responsive Spacing Tokens Typography Accordion Alert banner Breadcrumb Button Cards Checkbox Data table Dropdown Form Modal Navigation bar Page header Pagination Popover Progress bar Progress indicator Radio button Search Segmented control Sidebar Slider Switch Tabs Tag Text field Tooltip
